records.m_Talk_ENG: Hand it over while I'm being nice. Why make things harder for yourself?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hand it over while I'm being nice. Why make things harder for yourself?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No! This is for my sisters' medicine!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No! This is for my sisters' medicine!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No! This is for my sisters' medicine!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aww, sweet. Keep this up and you'll just rack up more medical bills. Don't be stubborn and give it here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aww, sweet. Keep this up and you'll just rack up more medical bills. Don't be stubborn and give it here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aww, sweet. Keep this up and you'll just rack up more medical bills. Don't be stubborn and give it here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh...! Let go of me, I said let go!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, you two! What do you think you're doing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, you two! What do you think you're doing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, you two! What do you think you're doing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Emma, are you okay? Did they hurt you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Emma, are you okay? Did they hurt you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Emma, are you okay? Did they hurt you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: R-Rachel!
records.m_Talk_DEU: R-Rachel!
records.m_Talk_FRA: R-Rachel!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think you're doing? Grown men picking on a kid. Aren't you ashamed?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think you're doing? Grown men picking on a kid. Aren't you ashamed?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think you're doing? Grown men picking on a kid. Aren't you ashamed?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Sure, I'm ashamed
8 8ashamed that I can't even squeeze some pocket change out of a brat.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Sure, I'm ashamed
8 8ashamed that I can't even squeeze some pocket change out of a brat.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Sure, I'm ashamed
8 8ashamed that I can't even squeeze some pocket change out of a brat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you waiting for? Get this little pest outta my way!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you waiting for? Get this little pest outta my way!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you waiting for? Get this little pest outta my way!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sir, that kid works for the loan shark Horizon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sir, that kid works for the loan shark Horizon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir, that kid works for the loan shark Horizon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? That psycho who committed assault on an international scale?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? That psycho who committed assault on an international scale?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? That psycho who committed assault on an international scale?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So even thugs know to fear Horizon, huh? And we're not loan shark, we're an investment fund, thank you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So even thugs know to fear Horizon, huh? And we're not loan shark, we're an investment fund, thank you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So even thugs know to fear Horizon, huh? And we're not loan shark, we're an investment fund, thank you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you don't wanna see something scary, I suggest you run while you can.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you don't wanna see something scary, I suggest you run while you can.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you don't wanna see something scary, I suggest you run while you can.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... Is that so?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... Is that so?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... Is that so?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, even better. If we grab her as a hostage, we can cash in big time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, even better. If we grab her as a hostage, we can cash in big time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, even better. If we grab her as a hostage, we can cash in big time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You sure that's a good idea? Rumor is she's got ties to the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You sure that's a good idea? Rumor is she's got ties to the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You sure that's a good idea? Rumor is she's got ties to the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You believe every rumor you hear? That's just smoke they blow to keep guys like us in line.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You believe every rumor you hear? That's just smoke they blow to keep guys like us in line.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You believe every rumor you hear? That's just smoke they blow to keep guys like us in line.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someone with real connections to the Administration wouldn't be running some investment fund in the refugee district.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someone with real connections to the Administration wouldn't be running some investment fund in the refugee district.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone with real connections to the Administration wouldn't be running some investment fund in the refugee district.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you guys are gonna regret this! I know plenty of scary people besides Horizon!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you guys are gonna regret this! I know plenty of scary people besides Horizon!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you guys are gonna regret this! I know plenty of scary people besides Horizon!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like General Musketeer, Sergeant! And a scary pirate lady! And, uh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like General Musketeer, Sergeant! And a scary pirate lady! And, uh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like General Musketeer, Sergeant! And a scary pirate lady! And, uh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, yeah. And I'm a scary man standing right in front of you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, yeah. And I'm a scary man standing right in front of you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, yeah. And I'm a scary man standing right in front of you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let go of me! Is anyone there?! Someone help!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let go of me! Is anyone there?! Someone help!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let go of me! Is anyone there?! Someone help!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Huh? Who the hell are you
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Huh? Who the hell are you
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Huh? Who the hell are you
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that I look, you're pretty cute. Clothes are kinda shabby though... You working in the streets?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that I look, you're pretty cute. Clothes are kinda shabby though... You working in the streets?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that I look, you're pretty cute. Clothes are kinda shabby though... You working in the streets?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perfect timing. We were just about to wrap up here. Just hang tight, and...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perfect timing. We were just about to wrap up here. Just hang tight, and...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perfect timing. We were just about to wrap up here. Just hang tight, and...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Move.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Move.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Move.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What did you say?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What did you say?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What did you say?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaargh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aaargh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaargh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what's wrong with you, you psycho?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what's wrong with you, you psycho?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what's wrong with you, you psycho?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: AAARGH! MY HAND! MY HAND...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: AAARGH! MY HAND! MY HAND...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: AAARGH! MY HAND! MY HAND...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Guess my blade's dulled. Didn't cut as clean as I hoped.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Guess my blade's dulled. Didn't cut as clean as I hoped.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Guess my blade's dulled. Didn't cut as clean as I hoped.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey...! You'll regret this! Do you have any idea who we are?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey...! You'll regret this! Do you have any idea who we are?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey...! You'll regret this! Do you have any idea who we are?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't care. Move.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't care. Move.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't care. Move.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
S-sir, that's a bad wound. We need to get you patched up first
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
S-sir, that's a bad wound. We need to get you patched up first
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
S-sir, that's a bad wound. We need to get you patched up first
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Grr...! This isn't over! I'll remember you!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Grr...! This isn't over! I'll remember you!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Grr...! This isn't over! I'll remember you!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Serves you right! Hope that festers and you rot in a hospital bed forever!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Serves you right! Hope that festers and you rot in a hospital bed forever!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Serves you right! Hope that festers and you rot in a hospital bed forever!

records.m_Talk_ENG: F-forever's a bit much. A year in the hospital should do it, you jerks!
records.m_Talk_DEU: F-forever's a bit much. A year in the hospital should do it, you jerks!
records.m_Talk_FRA: F-forever's a bit much. A year in the hospital should do it, you jerks!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you. If it weren't for you, we'd have been in real trouble.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you. If it weren't for you, we'd have been in real trouble.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you. If it weren't for you, we'd have been in real trouble.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come on, Emma. Say thank you properly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come on, Emma. Say thank you properly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come on, Emma. Say thank you properly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah... Th-thank you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah... Th-thank you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah... Th-thank you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I didn't do it to help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I didn't do it to help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I didn't do it to help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, I heard there's a skilled mechanic around here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, I heard there's a skilled mechanic around here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, I heard there's a skilled mechanic around here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A mechanic? Oh! You're looking for Mr. Helmsworth, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A mechanic? Oh! You're looking for Mr. Helmsworth, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A mechanic? Oh! You're looking for Mr. Helmsworth, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just follow this road and you'll find where he's staying. I can show you the way if you want?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just follow this road and you'll find where he's staying. I can show you the way if you want?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just follow this road and you'll find where he's staying. I can show you the way if you want?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's enough. I don't have time. I'll be going now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's enough. I don't have time. I'll be going now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's enough. I don't have time. I'll be going now.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Wait, at least let us thank you proper
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Wait, at least let us thank you proper
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Wait, at least let us thank you proper
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Or not. She left without even telling us her name.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Or not. She left without even telling us her name.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Or not. She left without even telling us her name.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is it, Emma?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is it, Emma?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is it, Emma?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's just... she kind of looked like the knight I admire.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's just... she kind of looked like the knight I admire.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's just... she kind of looked like the knight I admire.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm. I'm no expert in weapons, but it's been a while since I've seen a sword this busted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm. I'm no expert in weapons, but it's been a while since I've seen a sword this busted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm. I'm no expert in weapons, but it's been a while since I've seen a sword this busted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wouldn't it be faster to just get a new one?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wouldn't it be faster to just get a new one?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wouldn't it be faster to just get a new one?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Adapting to a new weapon slows me down. Not really my thing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Adapting to a new weapon slows me down. Not really my thing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Adapting to a new weapon slows me down. Not really my thing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They say you're a master craftsman. Is the repair too difficult?
records.m_Talk_DEU: They say you're a master craftsman. Is the repair too difficult?
records.m_Talk_FRA: They say you're a master craftsman. Is the repair too difficult?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Master craftsman, my foot. I just fixed a few things while staying here, and now I'm a legend, apparently.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Master craftsman, my foot. I just fixed a few things while staying here, and now I'm a legend, apparently.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Master craftsman, my foot. I just fixed a few things while staying here, and now I'm a legend, apparently.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's tough, but not impossible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's tough, but not impossible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's tough, but not impossible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll take care of the blade. Give me a moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll take care of the blade. Give me a moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll take care of the blade. Give me a moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your setup's simpler than I expected.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your setup's simpler than I expected.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your setup's simpler than I expected.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Told you, this is a side gig. My real workshop's in Ground One.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Told you, this is a side gig. My real workshop's in Ground One.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Told you, this is a side gig. My real workshop's in Ground One.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, this is pretty good for a place in the refugee district. I've picked up all kinds of stories here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, this is pretty good for a place in the refugee district. I've picked up all kinds of stories here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, this is pretty good for a place in the refugee district. I've picked up all kinds of stories here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're the one poking around intel dealers in the Underground lately, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're the one poking around intel dealers in the Underground lately, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're the one poking around intel dealers in the Underground lately, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And if I am? Are you going to report me to the Administration?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And if I am? Are you going to report me to the Administration?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And if I am? Are you going to report me to the Administration?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I was, I wouldn't be saying it out loud in front of you. I'm not that stupid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I was, I wouldn't be saying it out loud in front of you. I'm not that stupid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I was, I wouldn't be saying it out loud in front of you. I'm not that stupid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just speaking out of concern. Mercs like you tend to wind up on a death notice before long.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just speaking out of concern. Mercs like you tend to wind up on a death notice before long.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just speaking out of concern. Mercs like you tend to wind up on a death notice before long.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But since you helped the kids, I doubt you're a bad person. Just don't push yourself too far.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But since you helped the kids, I doubt you're a bad person. Just don't push yourself too far.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But since you helped the kids, I doubt you're a bad person. Just don't push yourself too far.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All done. Now then, I'd appreciate it if you got to the real reason you came.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All done. Now then, I'd appreciate it if you got to the real reason you came.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All done. Now then, I'd appreciate it if you got to the real reason you came.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Surely you didn't come all the way to the refugee district just to fix a sword?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Surely you didn't come all the way to the refugee district just to fix a sword?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Surely you didn't come all the way to the refugee district just to fix a sword?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're sharp.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're sharp.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're sharp.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Being nosy's part of the job. There's a reason experience matters, y'know?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Being nosy's part of the job. There's a reason experience matters, y'know?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Being nosy's part of the job. There's a reason experience matters, y'know?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And since you beat up those thugs I had my eye on, I'll help you however I can.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And since you beat up those thugs I had my eye on, I'll help you however I can.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And since you beat up those thugs I had my eye on, I'll help you however I can.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're the mechanic for Canary Squad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're the mechanic for Canary Squad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're the mechanic for Canary Squad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I want to meet the team's coach.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I want to meet the team's coach.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I want to meet the team's coach.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa, don't tell me you're here to take out my boss?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa, don't tell me you're here to take out my boss?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa, don't tell me you're here to take out my boss?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No wonder he's always surrounded by women! I knew this whole thing would go off the rails eventually!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No wonder he's always surrounded by women! I knew this whole thing would go off the rails eventually!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No wonder he's always surrounded by women! I knew this whole thing would go off the rails eventually!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I just want to talk.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I just want to talk.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I just want to talk.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pfft, well why didn't you say so in the first place?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pfft, well why didn't you say so in the first place?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pfft, well why didn't you say so in the first place?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You'll find him at the Gauntlet Arena. They have a match today anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You'll find him at the Gauntlet Arena. They have a match today anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You'll find him at the Gauntlet Arena. They have a match today anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Their opponent was... Right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Their opponent was... Right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Their opponent was... Right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's that TASKFORCE called the <color=#ffd34c>Zodiac Knights</color>.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Like General Musketeer, Sergeant! And a scary pirate lady! And, uh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, yeah. And I'm a scary man standing right in front of you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, yeah. And I'm a scary man standing right in front of you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, yeah. And I'm a scary man standing right in front of you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let go of me! Is anyone there?! Someone help!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let go of me! Is anyone there?! Someone help!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let go of me! Is anyone there?! Someone help!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Huh? Who the hell are you
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Huh? Who the hell are you
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Huh? Who the hell are you
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now that I look, you're pretty cute. Clothes are kinda shabby though... You working in the streets?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now that I look, you're pretty cute. Clothes are kinda shabby though... You working in the streets?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now that I look, you're pretty cute. Clothes are kinda shabby though... You working in the streets?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Perfect timing. We were just about to wrap up here. Just hang tight, and...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Perfect timing. We were just about to wrap up here. Just hang tight, and...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Perfect timing. We were just about to wrap up here. Just hang tight, and...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Move.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Move.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Move.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What did you say?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What did you say?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What did you say?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aaargh!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aaargh!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aaargh!

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-what's wrong with you, you psycho?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-what's wrong with you, you psycho?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-what's wrong with you, you psycho?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: AAARGH! MY HAND! MY HAND...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: AAARGH! MY HAND! MY HAND...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: AAARGH! MY HAND! MY HAND...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Guess my blade's dulled. Didn't cut as clean as I hoped.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Guess my blade's dulled. Didn't cut as clean as I hoped.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Guess my blade's dulled. Didn't cut as clean as I hoped.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey...! You'll regret this! Do you have any idea who we are?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey...! You'll regret this! Do you have any idea who we are?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey...! You'll regret this! Do you have any idea who we are?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't care. Move.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't care. Move.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't care. Move.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
S-sir, that's a bad wound. We need to get you patched up first
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
S-sir, that's a bad wound. We need to get you patched up first
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
S-sir, that's a bad wound. We need to get you patched up first
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Grr...! This isn't over! I'll remember you!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Grr...! This isn't over! I'll remember you!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Grr...! This isn't over! I'll remember you!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Serves you right! Hope that festers and you rot in a hospital bed forever!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Serves you right! Hope that festers and you rot in a hospital bed forever!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Serves you right! Hope that festers and you rot in a hospital bed forever!

root.m_Talk_ENG: F-forever's a bit much. A year in the hospital should do it, you jerks!
root.m_Talk_DEU: F-forever's a bit much. A year in the hospital should do it, you jerks!
root.m_Talk_FRA: F-forever's a bit much. A year in the hospital should do it, you jerks!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you. If it weren't for you, we'd have been in real trouble.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you. If it weren't for you, we'd have been in real trouble.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you. If it weren't for you, we'd have been in real trouble.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Come on, Emma. Say thank you properly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Come on, Emma. Say thank you properly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come on, Emma. Say thank you properly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: H-hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: H-hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: H-hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah... Th-thank you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah... Th-thank you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah... Th-thank you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I didn't do it to help.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I didn't do it to help.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I didn't do it to help.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, I heard there's a skilled mechanic around here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, I heard there's a skilled mechanic around here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, I heard there's a skilled mechanic around here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A mechanic? Oh! You're looking for Mr. Helmsworth, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A mechanic? Oh! You're looking for Mr. Helmsworth, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A mechanic? Oh! You're looking for Mr. Helmsworth, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just follow this road and you'll find where he's staying. I can show you the way if you want?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just follow this road and you'll find where he's staying. I can show you the way if you want?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just follow this road and you'll find where he's staying. I can show you the way if you want?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's enough. I don't have time. I'll be going now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's enough. I don't have time. I'll be going now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's enough. I don't have time. I'll be going now.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Wait, at least let us thank you proper
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Wait, at least let us thank you proper
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Wait, at least let us thank you proper
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Or not. She left without even telling us her name.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Or not. She left without even telling us her name.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Or not. She left without even telling us her name.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is it, Emma?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is it, Emma?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is it, Emma?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Nothing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Nothing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Nothing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's just... she kind of looked like the knight I admire.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's just... she kind of looked like the knight I admire.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's just... she kind of looked like the knight I admire.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm. I'm no expert in weapons, but it's been a while since I've seen a sword this busted.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm. I'm no expert in weapons, but it's been a while since I've seen a sword this busted.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm. I'm no expert in weapons, but it's been a while since I've seen a sword this busted.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wouldn't it be faster to just get a new one?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wouldn't it be faster to just get a new one?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wouldn't it be faster to just get a new one?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Adapting to a new weapon slows me down. Not really my thing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Adapting to a new weapon slows me down. Not really my thing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Adapting to a new weapon slows me down. Not really my thing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They say you're a master craftsman. Is the repair too difficult?
root.m_Talk_DEU: They say you're a master craftsman. Is the repair too difficult?
root.m_Talk_FRA: They say you're a master craftsman. Is the repair too difficult?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Master craftsman, my foot. I just fixed a few things while staying here, and now I'm a legend, apparently.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Master craftsman, my foot. I just fixed a few things while staying here, and now I'm a legend, apparently.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Master craftsman, my foot. I just fixed a few things while staying here, and now I'm a legend, apparently.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's tough, but not impossible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's tough, but not impossible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's tough, but not impossible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll take care of the blade. Give me a moment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll take care of the blade. Give me a moment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll take care of the blade. Give me a moment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your setup's simpler than I expected.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your setup's simpler than I expected.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your setup's simpler than I expected.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Told you, this is a side gig. My real workshop's in Ground One.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Told you, this is a side gig. My real workshop's in Ground One.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Told you, this is a side gig. My real workshop's in Ground One.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still, this is pretty good for a place in the refugee district. I've picked up all kinds of stories here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still, this is pretty good for a place in the refugee district. I've picked up all kinds of stories here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still, this is pretty good for a place in the refugee district. I've picked up all kinds of stories here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're the one poking around intel dealers in the Underground lately, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're the one poking around intel dealers in the Underground lately, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're the one poking around intel dealers in the Underground lately, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And if I am? Are you going to report me to the Administration?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And if I am? Are you going to report me to the Administration?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And if I am? Are you going to report me to the Administration?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I was, I wouldn't be saying it out loud in front of you. I'm not that stupid.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I was, I wouldn't be saying it out loud in front of you. I'm not that stupid.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I was, I wouldn't be saying it out loud in front of you. I'm not that stupid.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just speaking out of concern. Mercs like you tend to wind up on a death notice before long.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just speaking out of concern. Mercs like you tend to wind up on a death notice before long.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just speaking out of concern. Mercs like you tend to wind up on a death notice before long.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But since you helped the kids, I doubt you're a bad person. Just don't push yourself too far.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But since you helped the kids, I doubt you're a bad person. Just don't push yourself too far.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But since you helped the kids, I doubt you're a bad person. Just don't push yourself too far.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All done. Now then, I'd appreciate it if you got to the real reason you came.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All done. Now then, I'd appreciate it if you got to the real reason you came.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All done. Now then, I'd appreciate it if you got to the real reason you came.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Surely you didn't come all the way to the refugee district just to fix a sword?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Surely you didn't come all the way to the refugee district just to fix a sword?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Surely you didn't come all the way to the refugee district just to fix a sword?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're sharp.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're sharp.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're sharp.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Being nosy's part of the job. There's a reason experience matters, y'know?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Being nosy's part of the job. There's a reason experience matters, y'know?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Being nosy's part of the job. There's a reason experience matters, y'know?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And since you beat up those thugs I had my eye on, I'll help you however I can.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And since you beat up those thugs I had my eye on, I'll help you however I can.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And since you beat up those thugs I had my eye on, I'll help you however I can.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're the mechanic for Canary Squad.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're the mechanic for Canary Squad.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're the mechanic for Canary Squad.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I want to meet the team's coach.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I want to meet the team's coach.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I want to meet the team's coach.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa, don't tell me you're here to take out my boss?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa, don't tell me you're here to take out my boss?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa, don't tell me you're here to take out my boss?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No wonder he's always surrounded by women! I knew this whole thing would go off the rails eventually!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: No wonder he's always surrounded by women! I knew this whole thing would go off the rails eventually!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: No wonder he's always surrounded by women! I knew this whole thing would go off the rails eventually!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I just want to talk.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I just want to talk.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I just want to talk.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pfft, well why didn't you say so in the first place?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pfft, well why didn't you say so in the first place?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pfft, well why didn't you say so in the first place?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You'll find him at the Gauntlet Arena. They have a match today anyway.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You'll find him at the Gauntlet Arena. They have a match today anyway.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You'll find him at the Gauntlet Arena. They have a match today anyway.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Their opponent was... Right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Their opponent was... Right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Their opponent was... Right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's that TASKFORCE called the <color=#ffd34c>Zodiac Knights</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's that TASKFORCE called the <color=#ffd34c>Zodiac Knights</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's that TASKFORCE called the <color=#ffd34c>Zodiac Knights</color>.
